pulse.title: Project Pulse
pulse.delayed_copy: {phase} is {days} days overdue. Open Timeline and resolve the overdue phase.
pulse.thesis_needed_copy: Complete the Product Concept before deeper product decisions drift.
pulse.missing_field_copy: Add {field} so the project can be reviewed cleanly.
pulse.use_edit_or_ai: Use section edit or AI capture
pulse.inspiration_copy: Early-stage projects benefit from linked inspiration before variants and visuals branch out.
pulse.no_urgent_copy: No urgent action from existing project data.
concept.thesis_label: What is this product, and why?
renderings.no_visual_title: No rendering or prototype photo yet
renderings.no_visual_copy: Upload a rendering or prototype photo in Files to show the newest visual here automatically.
renderings.designer_portal_future: Future workspace for design handoff. Not active yet.
form.business_plan_help: Upload a business plan or product brief (PDF, Word, or image). After the project is created, AI will draft a Product Thesis from it for you to review before saving — much faster than typing one from scratch.
form.thesis_help: This is the soul of the product. Answer: why does this product exist? Who is it for? What's the core problem? What makes it different? Why does it fit this brand? What's the target price logic? What are the main risks or unknowns?
alert.no_projects: No projects yet — create your first project.
alert.no_files: No files yet — upload a rendering, quotation, or reference below.
alert.please_enter_text: Please enter some text to extract from.
chat.placeholder.project: Ask about this project, or describe an update to capture…
chat.placeholder.global: Search or ask about your projects…
chat.title: AI Chat
chat.mode_title: Ask = read-only Q&A. Intake = AI can capture / create.
chat.scope_title: Project scope = AI knows about this project. Global = no project context.
chat.confirm_scope_switch: Switching scope starts a new conversation. Continue?
chat.confirm_archive: Archive this conversation? It will disappear from history.
placeholder.name: Name
placeholder.plan_change_reason: e.g. Factory pushed sample delivery; engineering review took 2 extra weeks
placeholder.thesis_short: Why does this product exist? Who is it for...
placeholder.idea_note: How is this idea being used in this project?
placeholder.idea_name_example: e.g. Forged Damascus from XYZ Factory
placeholder.idea_description: More detail. Why is this cool? How might we use it?
placeholder.source_detail: Factory name, tradeshow, Amazon URL, etc.
placeholder.idea_notes: Any other notes — pricing, contact, sample availability...
placeholder.project_name_example: e.g. Damascus Chef Knife, KlikTac Balisong, 8-bit EDC...
placeholder.product_type_example: e.g. folding knife, EDC tool, balisong...
placeholder.thesis_long:
Why does this product exist? Who is it for and what problem does it solve?
What makes it different from existing products in this category?
Why does this belong to this brand specifically?
What's our target price logic — why will customers see value at $X?
What are the main risks or unknowns we need to watch?
placeholder.intake_notes: e.g. Hey, so we're working on a new chef knife for the Rblack line. Factory is Guangzhou Blade Co. Sarah Chen is PM, Mike Torres is on engineering. Target cost around $18, MSRP $129.99. Aiming for Q4 2026 launch. This knife is for home cooks who want a pro-feel blade without spending $300...
placeholder.thesis_short_question: Why does this product exist? Who is it for? What problem does it solve?
placeholder.component_name: e.g. Hard plastic case, Pouch, Sharpening stone
auth.invite_required: You need an invite PIN from your administrator
auth.username_help: Lowercase, no spaces. Used to log in.
auth.display_name_help: How your name appears in projects. Should match how you enter it in the PM field.
auth.invite_pin_help: Ask your administrator to generate a PIN for you.
auth.emergency_reset_help: For use when the admin account is inaccessible. This route is only available because this token is set on the server:
auth.reset_token_help: Must exactly match the env var set on the server.
auth.new_username_help: Lowercased. If an admin already exists, they'll be renamed and re-keyed.
my_projects.admin_subtitle: Admin view — all {count} projects in the system.
my_projects.pm_subtitle: Projects where you are the listed PM ({count} total).
my_projects.empty_pm: You're not listed as the PM on any projects yet. Ask an admin to assign you, or create one yourself.
my_projects.empty_admin: No projects in the system yet.
calendar.subtitle: Planned vs. actual project launches, by month
calendar.empty_planned: No projects planned to launch in {month} {year}.
ideas.subtitle: Materials, structures, features & aesthetics from across the team — combine across columns to make new products.
ideas.type_help: What kind of idea is this — material, structure, feature…
ideas.contributor_help: Default: you. Change if you're logging on someone else's behalf.
idea_status.in_use: In Use — linked to a project
intake.paste_help: Paste any raw notes, emails, WhatsApp messages, or meeting notes about the product. AI will pull out what it can.
intake.upload_help: Upload a PDF (spec sheet, quotation, email export) or an image of the product. AI will extract fields and generate a summary.
intake.extracted_edit_before_confirm: AI extracted these fields. Edit anything before confirming.
intake.idea_saved_hint: The idea will appear on the
intake.update_or_create_hint: You can update this project with the extracted fields, or create a new one below.
intake.fill_now_or_later: fill them in below or add later.
intake.all_critical_extracted: All critical fields extracted — looking good.
intake.review_before_save: Review what AI extracted. Edit any field before confirming. Nothing is saved until you click Confirm & Create.
intake.confirm_or_update_hint: Confirm & Create creates a new project. Update applies extracted fields to the existing match (only non-empty fields are changed).
intake.new_project_hint: Project will be created with a single-prototype phase template. You can adjust phases on the project detail page.
project.delete_confirm: Permanently delete this project? This cannot be undone.
project.thesis_empty_error: Thesis cannot be empty — use Edit to clear it intentionally.
project.thesis_extract_error: Something went wrong with thesis extraction.
project.thesis_guide: Why this product exists · Who it's for · What makes it different · Brand fit · Price logic · Risks
project.thesis_missing: Product Concept is missing or too short.
project.upload_business_plan_label: Upload business plan (PDF, Word, or image)
project.upload_business_plan_help: AI will read it and propose a thesis + any inspirations for your review. Nothing gets saved until you confirm on the preview screen.
project.link_idea_hint: Click Link Idea above to connect this project to inspirations from the
project.capture_idea_hint: Capture a new inspiration here or link one from the Good Ideas board.
timeline.plan_reality_hint: Plan ↔ Reality. * marks a planned date that's been adjusted.
timeline.reason_required: Plan-date changes require a reason. Open the phase, enter a reason in the Reason for plan change field, and save again.
timeline.action_error: Something went wrong with that timeline action.
timeline.plan_help: Plan = what you originally committed to. Changing a planned date requires a reason below (writes to plan-change history).
timeline.reality_help: Reality = what actually happened. Updating these does NOT require a reason. Tip: use the green Finish phase button on the timeline row to set Actual End + advance the next phase in one click.
timeline.finish_confirm: Mark {phase} as done and advance the next phase?
files.use_upload_below: Use Files upload below (pick the matching category)
files.delete_media_confirm: Delete this file? This cannot be undone.
files.comment_placeholder: What does this show? Pivots, feedback, who liked what...
files.use_files_hint: Use the Files section below to upload and pick the matching category.
journal.error_summarize_failed: AI summary failed — try again in a moment.
journal.error_not_authorized: You don't have permission for that action.
journal.error_not_your_entry: You can only edit your own journal entries.
journal.error_delete_admin_only: Only an admin can delete journal entries.
journal.error_entry_not_found: That journal entry no longer exists.
journal.placeholder: What happened today on this project? Factory discussion, cost surprise, design pivot, an open question you're sitting with...
journal.delete_confirm: Delete this journal entry? This cannot be undone.
journal.empty_editable: No journal entries yet. Click Add Project Update to log a factory discussion, decision, or open question.
variant.name: Variant name
variant.delete_confirm: Delete variant {name}? This cannot be undone.
variant.empty_hint: Click Add Variant to create the first SKU.
component.empty_hint: Click Add Component to record packaging, accessories, or anything that ships with the product.
quotation.upload_hint: Use the Files section below to upload a factory quotation — pick Quotation as the category.
profit.design_note: The model will use the primary variant's costs by default. Per-variant components apply only to their variant; project-wide components apply to every variant. See
profit.costs_hidden: Cost figures are not visible at your access level.
profit.preview_ignores: This preview ignores overhead and forecast volume. v1.2 will add both.
profit.no_primary_hint: Once a primary variant is set, this section will preview the per-unit margin. Set a variant as primary in the Variants section above.
thesis_preview.title: Review Thesis Extraction
thesis_preview.confirm_rule: AI proposes; you confirm. Nothing is saved until you click Confirm.
thesis_preview.failure_help: Your project and the uploaded file are saved. You can fill the thesis manually or upload a different file from the project detail page.
thesis_preview.thesis_hint: Needs at least 80 characters · edit freely before confirming
thesis_preview.placeholder: Edit or write the thesis here...
thesis_preview.no_inspirations: No inspirations detected in the source. You can always add ideas manually from the Good Ideas page.
thesis_preview.choose_action: For each, choose whether to create a new idea, link to an existing one, or skip.
variant.margin_no_data: Not enough data for a margin preview yet.
variant.profit_future_note: Full profit model coming in v1.4 — see Profit Model section below.
